name: hdd_mild_slow
description: Mildly degraded HDD — sustained ~2.4× slowdown with rare spikes. Models the average fail-slow event observed in large-scale production clusters.
sources: USENIX ATC 2022 (large-scale fail-slow study): HDD avg event latency ~20.6ms, avg slowdown ratio ~2.41×
FAST 2016 'The Tail at Store': 2–3× slowdown is the most common fail-slow band for HDDs
notes: spike_prob=0.01 is an engineering approximation of P99.9 tail behavior; not a directly measured per-request rate. See Deep Research Session 4 for calibration rationale.
